title: PPE, Moving Parts, And Walkway Hazard Policy

sections.title: PPE control
sections.content: Missing eye protection, gloves, hearing protection, or required area PPE should create an EHS observation and require supervisor confirmation before task continuation.

sections.title: Moving parts exposure
sections.content: Open guards, exposed moving parts, bypassed interlocks, or hands near transfer points require immediate stop-and-make-safe action.

sections.title: Blocked walkway and slip risk
sections.content: Blocked walkways, spills, loose pallets, cords, and material in marked pedestrian lanes require area isolation and corrective action logging.

sections.title: EHS case evidence
sections.content: A safety action card should preserve scene, risk, action, owner, and human confirmation without claiming the area is safe for restart.
